symptom_description: Control panel showing earth fault. Inspection of power cable drop revealed high cuts and exposed copper armor.
root_cause: Accidental pinch damage during previous pump lifting and lowering operation along guide rails.
action_taken: Renewed power cable assembly, installed rubber guide rail chafing protectors, and re-torqued strain relief clamp.
parts_used: Submersible Power Drop Cable Assembly, Terminal Gland O-Ring Set

symptom_description: Submersible pump seal chamber leak detector alarm active. Small pressure drop noticed during pull test.
root_cause: Corrosion of lower seal housing lip due to aggressive wastewater chemistry.
action_taken: Replaced lower silicon carbide seal faces and upper lip seal; flushed and refilled barrier fluid reservoir.
parts_used: Double Mechanical Seal Assembly, Seal Chamber Gasket Set

symptom_description: Severe short circuit current surge tripped upstream breaker. Tech noted distinct burnt electrical smell from terminal junction box.
root_cause: Stator winding ground fault caused by internal vibration chafing insulation against stator core slots.
action_taken: Replaced complete submersible motor assembly, renewed cable entry seal assembly, and tested megger resistance before dropping into pit.
parts_used: Submersible Motor Assembly, Cable Entry Seal Kit

symptom_description: Submersible power cable jacket split near guide rail clamp. Insulation resistance between conductors fluctuating severely.
root_cause: Accidental pinch damage during previous pump lifting and lowering operation along guide rails.
action_taken: Replaced damaged 50-foot section of submersible power cable, installed new heavy-duty cable entry gland, and secured strain relief.
parts_used: Marine Resin Cable Splice Kit, Stainless Abrasion Sleeve

symptom_description: Moisture sensor in pump oil chamber triggered high humidity/water interlock alarm on main control panel.
root_cause: Improper tension on seal spring during previous overhaul allowed fluid separation across stationary face.
action_taken: Disassembled lower end, renewed double mechanical seal assembly and O-rings, and pressure tested oil chamber to 15 PSI.
parts_used: Double Mechanical Seal Assembly, Seal Chamber Gasket Set

symptom_description: Control panel showing earth fault. Inspection of power cable drop revealed heavy cuts and exposed copper armor.
root_cause: Continuous vibration and turbulence caused power cable to chafe against concrete edge of sump pit access hatch.
action_taken: Spliced and potted cable using marine-grade resin splice kit, installed protective stainless abrasion sleeve over guide rail area.
parts_used: Power Cable Assembly, Rubber Chafing Guard, Gland Kit

symptom_description: Routine inspection of oil chamber sampling port revealed milky, emulsified oil (`concerning` water contamination).
root_cause: Lower mechanical seal face scoring caused by solid grit and abrasive slurry passing through pump volute.
action_taken: Renewed tandem mechanical seals, replaced corroded seal retainer ring, and verified zero drop on 30-minute pressure decay test.
parts_used: Silicon Carbide Lower Seal Set, Upper Carbon Seal, Dielectric Oil

symptom_description: Pump lost power suddenly (`0` Amps). Cable strain relief failed allowing cable to rub against concrete pit wall.
root_cause: Improper clamping of cable strain relief allowed cable weight to pull on terminal entry gland, tearing outer polyurethane jacket.
action_taken: Spliced and potted cable using marine-grade resin splice kit, installed protective stainless abrasion sleeve over guide rail area.
parts_used: Submersible Power Drop Cable Assembly, Terminal Gland O-Ring Set

symptom_description: Intermittent phase loss alarms and grounding trips on pump feed. Cable outer sheath shows slight abrasion near wet well lip.
root_cause: Accidental pinch damage during previous pump lifting and lowering operation along guide rails.
action_taken: Replaced damaged 50-foot section of submersible power cable, installed new heavy-duty cable entry gland, and secured strain relief.
parts_used: Submersible Power Drop Cable Assembly, Terminal Gland O-Ring Set

symptom_description: Severe short circuit current surge tripped upstream breaker. Tech noted unusual burnt electrical smell from terminal junction box.
root_cause: Moisture ingress into motor enclosure through degraded cable entry seal caused stator winding insulation breakdown.
action_taken: Replaced complete submersible motor assembly, renewed cable entry seal assembly, and tested megger resistance before dropping into pit.
parts_used: Submersible Motor Assembly, Cable Entry Seal Kit

symptom_description: Loud metallic clattering and churning sound coming from submerged pump volute. Discharge check valve showing zero pressure.
root_cause: Large solid debris wedged between impeller shroud and volute tongue, locking impeller partially.
action_taken: Cleared clogged suction screen and impeller passage; hydro-blasted wet well sump walls to remove grease accumulation.

symptom_description: High water content in barrier oil reservoir. No external leak visible yet but lower mechanical seal compromised.
root_cause: Corrosion of lower seal housing lip due to aggressive wastewater chemistry.
action_taken: Disassembled lower end, renewed double mechanical seal assembly and O-rings, and pressure tested oil chamber to 15 PSI.
parts_used: Double Mechanical Seal Assembly, Seal Chamber Gasket Set

symptom_description: Intermittent phase loss alarms and grounding trips on pump feed. Cable outer sheath shows significant abrasion near wet well lip.
root_cause: Accidental pinch damage during previous pump lifting and lowering operation along guide rails.
action_taken: Spliced and potted cable using marine-grade resin splice kit, installed protective stainless abrasion sleeve over guide rail area.
parts_used: Marine Resin Cable Splice Kit, Stainless Abrasion Sleeve

symptom_description: Severe short circuit current surge tripped upstream breaker. Tech noted gradual burnt electrical smell from terminal junction box.
root_cause: Stator winding ground fault caused by internal vibration chafing insulation against stator core slots.
action_taken: Pulled submersible pump from sump, sent to certified rewind shop for full stator rewinding and vacuum pressure impregnation (VPI).
parts_used: Submersible Motor Assembly, Cable Entry Seal Kit

symptom_description: Pump lost power suddenly (`0` Amps). Cable strain relief failed allowing cable to rub against concrete pit wall.
root_cause: Continuous vibration and turbulence caused power cable to chafe against concrete edge of sump pit access hatch.
action_taken: Installed new multi-conductor submersible power drop cable, renewed terminal gland assembly, and tested continuity.
parts_used: Marine Resin Cable Splice Kit, Stainless Abrasion Sleeve

symptom_description: Loud cavitation crackling and churning sound coming from submerged pump volute. Discharge check valve showing zero pressure.
root_cause: Accumulation of fibrous wipes, rags, and solid debris wrapped tightly around multi-vane impeller leading edges.
action_taken: Disassembled volute casing, removed heavy silt/rag blockage, and checked impeller wear ring clearances.

symptom_description: Pump motor current drop (`marked` below normal load amps) accompanied by zero flow discharge and significant casing vibration.
root_cause: Inlet suction screen completely blinded off by floating debris and grease buildup in wet well.
action_taken: Pulled pump out of wet well, manually cleared fibrous ragball from impeller vanes, and flushed volute chamber with high-pressure hose.
